2605.02283.title: Rethinking Electro-Optical Vision Foundation Models for Remote Sensing Retrieval: A Controlled Comparison with Generalist VFM
2605.02283.paper_summary: Vision foundation models have attracted significant attention for their ability to leverage large-scale unlabeled visual data. This advantage is particularly important in remote sensing, where data acquisition is costly and annotation often requires expert knowledge. Recent electro-optical vision foundation models aim to learn domain-specific representations from remote sensing imagery, but it remains unclear whether they are more effective than strong generalist vision foundation models under retrieval-based evaluation. In this study, we conduct a controlled comparison between representative EO-specific and generalist vision foundation models for remote sensing image retrieval. Using the same datasets, retrieval protocol, and evaluation metric, we evaluate both in-domain performance and cross-scene generalization. Our results show that strong generalist vision foundation models are competitive with, and in some cases outperform, existing EO-specific models. Moreover, EO-specific models often suffer from substantial degradation under cross-scene evaluation, while generalist models show more stable transfer. These findings suggest that EO pretraining alone does not guarantee stronger retrieval-oriented remote sensing representations. We discuss the limitations of current EO-specific pretraining strategies and highlight the need for future EO vision foundation models to better exploit the physical, spatial, spectral, and geographic characteristics of remote sensing imagery.
2605.02283.paper_summary_zh: 視覺基礎模型因其能夠利用大規模未標記的視覺數據而受到廣泛關注。<lb/>這一優勢在遙感領域尤其重要，因為數據獲取成本高昂，且標註通常需要專家知識。<lb/>近期的電光學視覺基礎模型旨在從遙感影像中學習特定領域的表示，但在基於檢索的評估中，它們是否比強大的通用視覺基礎模型更有效仍不清楚。<lb/>在本研究中，我們對代表性的電光學特定模型和通用視覺基礎模型進行了受控比較，以進行遙感影像檢索。<lb/>使用相同的數據集、檢索協議和評估指標，我們評估了域內性能和跨場景泛化能力。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，強大的通用視覺基礎模型在競爭中與現有的電光學特定模型相當，並在某些情況下超越它們。<lb/>此外，電光學特定模型在跨場景評估中往往遭受顯著降級，而通用模型則顯示出更穩定的轉移。<lb/>這些發現表明，僅僅依賴電光學預訓練並不能保證更強的檢索導向遙感表示。<lb/>我們討論了當前電光學特定預訓練策略的局限性，並強調未來的電光學視覺基礎模型需要更好地利用遙感影像的物理、空間、光譜和地理特徵。
2605.02283.author: Hyobin Park et.al.
2605.02283.authors: Hyobin Park, Minseok Seo, Dong-Geol Choi
